issue.title: @gitclaw /heartbeat e2e 20260531T151940Z
issue.body:
Live heartbeat-report E2E.

Hidden heartbeat report body token: NOECHO_HEARTBEAT_REPORT_20260531T151940Z
This should produce a deterministic heartbeat operator report without a model call.
The report must not print .gitclaw/HEARTBEAT.md contents.
issue.author: AnandChowdhary

transcript.Body:
@gitclaw /heartbeat e2e 20260531T151940Z

Live heartbeat-report E2E.

Hidden heartbeat report body token: NOECHO_HEARTBEAT_REPORT_20260531T151940Z
This should produce a deterministic heartbeat operator report without a model call.
The report must not print .gitclaw/HEARTBEAT.md contents.

## GitClaw Heartbeat Report

Generated without a model call.

- repository: `AnandChowdhary/gitclaw`
- issue: `#416`
- heartbeat_report_status: `ok`
- heartbeat_label: `gitclaw:heartbeat`
- trigger_label: `gitclaw`
- disabled_label: `gitclaw:disabled`
- workflow_path: `.github/workflows/gitclaw-heartbeat.yml`
- workflow_present: `true`
- workflow_dispatch_trigger: `true`
- schedule_trigger: `true`
- schedule_entries: `1`
- permissions_contents_read: `true`
- permissions_issues_write: `true`
- permissions_models_read: `true`
- workflow_inputs: `3`
- heartbeat_context_path: `.gitclaw/HEARTBEAT.md`
- heartbeat_context_present: `true`
- default_limit: `3`
- slot_strategy: `utc-hour-or-explicit`
- idempotency_marker: `gitclaw:heartbeat`
- heartbeat_marker_model_telemetry: `true`
- heartbeat_marker_prompt_provenance: `true`
- heartbeat_marker_usage_telemetry: `true`
- quiet_response: `HEARTBEAT_OK`
- model_call_required: `false`
- runner_model_call_required: `true`
- repository_mutation_allowed: `false`
- issue_scan_performed: `false`
- raw_bodies_included: `false`
- raw_heartbeat_body_included: `false`
- llm_e2e_required_after_change: `true`
- llm_e2e_required_after_heartbeat_marker_change: `true`
- heartbeat_label_present: `true`
- disabled_label_present: `false`
- heartbeat_comments_now: `0`
- issue_title_sha256_12: `5cda773a305a`

This report audits the checked-in heartbeat surface. It does not scan heartbeat issues or call a model; the scheduled runner does both through GitHub Actions and GitHub Models. Workflow bodies, issue bodies, comments, and heartbeat context bodies are not included.

### Workflow
- `.github/workflows/gitclaw-heartbeat.yml` present=`true` bytes=`1882` lines=`65` workflow_dispatch=`true` schedule=`true` schedule_entries=`1` contents_read=`true` issues_write=`true` models_read=`true` inputs=`3` sha256_12=`c354982765fb`

### Heartbeat Context
- `.gitclaw/HEARTBEAT.md` present=`true` bytes=`595` lines=`14` sha256_12=`18c511b8d61b`

### Runtime Contract
- `gitclaw heartbeat --repo <owner/repo>` runs the actual heartbeat scanner and may call the configured model
- `gitclaw heartbeat status` renders this read-only report and never calls the model
- `.github/workflows/gitclaw-heartbeat.yml` supports manual `workflow_dispatch` and scheduled UTC cron dispatch
- the runner lists open issues with the heartbeat label, skips disabled issues and pull requests, and writes at most one heartbeat comment per slot
- model output `HEARTBEAT_OK` suppresses visible comments for quiet turns

### Verification Findings
- none
